name: ThreatActor
description: A nation-state-sponsored threat actor or advanced persistent threat (APT) group whose malware USCYBERCOM has publicly disclosed.

actor_id.description: Unique identifier for the threat actor.

name.description: Common name or alias of the threat actor.

alternative_names.description: Alternative names, aliases, or designations for this threat actor.

nation_state_sponsor.description: Nation-state that sponsors or directs this threat actor.

sponsoring_agency.description: Specific government agency or military unit attributed to this actor.

primary_motivation.description: Primary motivation driving this threat actor.

targeted_sectors.description: Industry sectors and critical infrastructure primarily targeted by this actor.

malware_families.description: Malware families or tools attributed to this threat actor.

first_observed.description: Approximate date this threat actor was first publicly identified.

mitre_group_id.description: MITRE ATT&CK Group identifier for this threat actor.

description.description: Description of the threat actor's activities and characteristics.
